name: Monochrome Studio Silhouette
commercial_use: Premium campaign, collection mood image, editorial landing page
visual_goal: Create a graphic fashion image focused on shape, silhouette, and attitude.
composition: Full-body or three-quarter frame against a monochrome studio set with strong silhouette readability.
model_direction: Use a sculptural standing pose with one angular line through the arms, shoulders, or legs.
styling_notes: Choose garments with a strong outline, structured shoulders, volume, or distinctive hem.
lighting: Controlled studio light with soft edge contrast and clean separation from background.
camera_language: 50mm lens look, low visual clutter, high-end campaign framing.
prompt: High-end monochrome studio fashion photograph of a model in a sculptural pose, strong garment silhouette, clean tonal background, controlled studio lighting, graphic premium campaign mood, elegant shape and refined styling.
negative_prompt: flat silhouette, messy outline, background blending into garment, overprocessed contrast, distorted pose
